LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS NICOLE MEREDITH, VOGL, MEREDITH AND BURKE'S MOTION TO LIFT THE STAY; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS OF NOT LESS THAN 1,950.00. MATTER CALLED. ARGUMENT IS HELD. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING CONTINUING THE MATTER TO MAY 24, 2021 AND ENTERS THE FOLLOWING RULING: THE MOTION IS GRANTED, SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. MS. GRAFT IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KERLINE ASTRE'S MOTION TO MODIFY STAY AND SEAL RECORD. THE MATTER IS CALLED. MR. WITTEMAN STATES THAT HE WILL NOT ARGUE THE TENTATIVE RULING, THAT HE IS PREPARED TO SUBMIT, AND STATES THAT HE HAS ONE QUESTION FOR THE COURT WITH REGARD TO THE DENIAL OF THE STAY. THE COURT AND COUNSEL BRIEFLY CONFER REGARDING THAT ISSUE. AT THE CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSIONS, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF KERLINE ASTRE'S MOTION TO MODIFY OR IMPOSE STAY IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SEAL THE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL FILED ON APRIL 28, 2021 IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED, ALTHOUGH THE DECLARATION CONSISTS LARGELY OF LEGAL ARGUMENT AND THE COURT DOES NOT BELIEVE THAT IT MEETS THE STANDARDS SET FORTH IN CAL. R. CT. 2.550. (SEE WORD MINUTES OR ORDER SIGNED THIS DATE FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR NO. 5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-22-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Motion To Modify Stay And Seal Record With Court Reporter Fee
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Matthew J. Witteman, Esq. of the Law Office of Matthew Witteman, 707.721.2131, for the Plaintiff Kerline Astre;
Atty. Andrew King, Esq. of 925.247.8779, for Defendant Nonprofits Insurance Alliance of California.

PLAINTIFF KERLINE ASTRE'S Motion To Modify Stay And Seal Record.

The matter is called. Mr. Witteman states that he will not argue the tentative ruling, that he is prepared to submit, and states that he has one question for the Court with regard to the denial of the stay. The Court and counsel briefly confer regarding that issue.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Kerline Astre's motion to modify or impose stay is denied. Plaintiff's motion to seal the declaration of counsel filed on April 28, 2021 is granted as unopposed, although the declaration consists largely of legal argument and the Court does not believe that it meets the standards set forth in Cal. R. Ct. 2.550.

(See Word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift The Stay; Request For Monetary Sanctions Of Not Less Than 1,950.00
Off Calendar Apr-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Matthew Witteman, Esq. of the Law Offices of Matthew J. Witteman, 707.721.2131, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Alex Graft, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard Smith LLP, 415.362.2580, appearing for the Defendants Nicole Meredith, Vogl, Meredith and Burke;
Atty. Andrew King, Esq. of Bloom & King LLP, 925.247.8779, for Defendant Nonprofits Insurance Alliance of California.

DEFENDANTS NICOLE MEREDITH, VOGL, MEREDITH AND BURKE'S Motion To Lift The Stay; Request For Monetary Sanctions Of Not Less Than 1,950.00.

Matter called. ARGUMENT is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court vacates its tentative ruling continuing the matter to May 24, 2021 and enters the following ruling: the motion is granted, sanctions are denied.

Ms. Graft is to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
